title: Sales Interior Designer
description:
📢 We're Hiring Interior Designers (Sales)! 📢

We are currently seeking talented Interior Designers (Sales) to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for meeting with clients, understanding their needs, and translating their vision into stunning, functional interior designs that exceed their expectations.

✨ What you'll be doing:

  • Meeting with clients to understand their design requirements, preferences, and budgets

  • Conducting site visits and space measurements to gather essential information for design planning

  • Create detailed layouts and stunning design concepts in 2D/3D to showcase design ideas

  • Preparing quotations for project costing

  • Propose specifications and suitable material selection to clients

  • Liaise with contractors and suppliers for smooth execution of work

  • Providing excellent service and support to our clients throughout the design and renovation process

✨ What we're looking for:

  • Singaporeans & Permanent Residents are welcome to apply

  • Preferably min. 1 year experience as an Interior Designer (Sales). Candidates without prior experience and are motivated to join us are also welcome to apply

  • Proficiency in design software, such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Adobe Creative Suite is preferable

  • Excellent project management and problem-solving skills

  • Independent, deadline-driven mindset

  • A keen eye for aesthetics and a deep understanding of the latest design trends and materials

✨What we offer:

  • Flexible & hybrid work arrangement

  • A basic salary ranging from $1200-$1800 monthly depending on the experience and permit holder type

  • Plus attractive commission on top of basic salary

  • Comprehensive training is provided

  • Verified sales leads are provided

  • Supportive and welcoming working environment

📍Our office/showroom is located in UB. One

📩 Passionate about crafting spaces that are both beautiful and functional? Let's build something amazing together! Apply now!

postedCompany.description: At Design Maker, we transform spaces into functional, stylish, and comfortable environments tailored to clients lifestyle. Based in Singapore, our team specializes in innovative interior design and renovation solutions for homes and businesses. We believe that great interior design shouldn’t be complicated or overpriced. Our team focuses on understanding clients needs, optimizing space, and delivering quality workmanship that lasts. We are made up of a small and cozy team and would love to have more designers to join us in this designing journey.
postedCompany.name: DESIGN MAKER PTE. LTD.
